description_long: This object is a large, arched-lid chest constructed primarily from dark, weathered wood with reinforced metal bands and fittings. The chest features a prominent circular metal handle on each end, suggesting it is designed to be carried or dragged. The lid is domed and appears to be reinforced with metal strips, while the front face includes a central latch mechanism for securing the lid. The wood panels are vertically aligned and bordered by thicker wooden frames, giving the chest a robust and sturdy appearance. The surface shows signs of wear and aging, with visible scuffs and scratches on both the wood and metal components. This chest would be suitable for storing or transporting goods in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, arched-lid wooden chest with metal reinforcements, circular end handles, and a central latch, showing signs of wear and aging.
description_view_0: End view showing the circular metal handle and the arched wooden lid with visible metal bands.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the central latch, vertical wood panels, and the domed lid with metal reinforcements.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with another circular metal handle and the same arched lid structure.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the continuous wood paneling and metal hinges securing the lid.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal bands and hinges on lid and body
